title: Biocon Digital Technologies is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Biocon Digital Technologies is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Biocon Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Indore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Biocon Digital Technologies:
Biocon Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Biocon Digital Technologies!
